reviews.review_description: First great social experience with adults and without the chaos. Can imagine hopping in here often to feel more human connections. Worth checking out for sure.

developer_response.body:
✨Yes! This is exactly what Cheerio is all about ✨
We are building a community where you can find exactly who you are looking to meet.
-Mr. Cheerio 😏

reviews.review_title: Most straightforward way to meet people
reviews.review_description: Usually in VR you just are aimlessly wandering hoping you‘ll get lucky and find someone you can have a nice conversation with. But it’s easy with Cheerio. Found someone who seemed funny, had a great convo and look forward to more ❤️

developer_response.body:
That’s amazing!🥰
We love hearing love stories that started at Cheerio! 🔥
-Mr. Cheerio 🤗

reviews.review_title: An awesome new way of meeting people!
reviews.review_description: You can record yourself and chat asynchronously by sending each other holographic messages; scroll through other people's recordings and find cute, funny, and weird ones. It's entertaining. There's also a helpful Mr. Cheerio's hologram to show you around and chat. Future is here.

developer_response.body:
Hey Dima, thanks for the detailed description of the app! We are delighted that you enjoy our virtual community 🌈
-Mr. Cheerio 🤗

reviews.review_description: Great design and cool way to meet in VR & network. From download to app start it takes like 30 seconds to get going. ⏳

developer_response.body:
We are so happy that you are meeting people in our community 🌈
-Mr. Cheerio 🤗

reviews.review_description: Cheerio is a hodgepodge of social experiences - and I think it’s really fun! They have live chats to meet new people, and asynchronous ways to connect by sharing public and private holograms...my favorite thing to do is just watch and vote on other peoples’ holograms

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your experience Solaris! 🥰

We love to hear that you are enjoying our live match system and the one-on-one asynchronous hologram chats. 🌼
Don't forget to mention how amazing the Travel feature is! 🌈🌎

We are building a warm community and we love that you are part of it! 
-Mr. Cheerio 🤗

reviews.review_description: It's more of a VR telegram, kinda message board. Like it's a big metaphysical wall where we all leave notes for other people on to listen to. Hell, I don't know. The best selling breakfast cereal in the united states is honey nut cheerios.

developer_response.body:
We love bringing people together! We want to help you find your VR match 💞
-Mr. Cheerio 😏

reviews.review_title: Truly the most welcoming social VR app!
reviews.review_description:
It is a very special experience for me - I got to meet people I have communicated with directly or indirectly (through VR Oxygen when we were testing the app), but have never seen them or spoke with them. It is so exciting to see all our members (like in real life) in VR! When I saw familiar usernames I felt like I've known all these people before and I just kept and kept watching, learning how unique and interesting each person is. And there are great prompts in Cheerio - a creative way to jumpstart the communication.

I loved traveling in Cheerio - so many locations, and really good quality footage! So I actually traveled for quite a while too. 
Hologram-based communication is a great solution when you can get an idea of whom you are speaking with by hearing their voice, observing their behavior, listening to what they like or want to talk about - all at once before you actually meet them. I am impressed. Cheerio has the most interesting, creative, and welcoming crowd from around the world.

I thought I would come to just check out what new updates were built but I ended up spending quite a while in Cheerio and I already want back. I am coming back tomorrow. Meet me in Cheerio!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much Olga! 🥰
We are building a community for you to express just how unique you are! Here you can find love and be friends with people from all over the world 🌈🌎
-Mr. Cheerio 🤗

reviews.review_title: First time to use the Oculus avatar
reviews.review_description: It's an awesome idea to use the Oculus default avatar in the app which I've never used since set up first time a while ago. Social and interactive apps in VR are still not that many and this app is not like gaming like more like business and common things for adult that's what I have been waiting for.

developer_response.body:
Yes! You can use your own Oculus avatar for meeting new people in Cheerio! 🌈🌎
In our community we care for meaningful relationships, so you can decide who you meet before you match!
Having full control is great! 🔥
-Mr. Cheerio 😏

reviews.review_description: Great app for making friends and having one-on-one conversations! Also, cool feature that lets you filter by age (if you’re looking to connect with someone your age).

developer_response.body:
We are delighted to know that you enjoy the power of one-on-one conversations! In Cheerio you are in control of who you meet. So, if you don’t feel like matching someone you can just swipe and continue chatting with more interesting people from around the world 🌎
-Mr. Cheerio 😏

reviews.review_description:
The app is really fun to play. I have met a lot of nice people with really cool stories to share. 
Apart from that, I was able to travel the world like in google street view. 
I hope I met more people in here!

developer_response.body:
Thank you, Juan! 🥰
✨We love having you in our Community✨
Keep enjoying our Travel feature 🌈🌎
-Mr. Cheerio 🤗

reviews.review_description: First I’ll start by saying it’s a simplistic app but definitely needs major improvements.. I’ve had it for several months and yet I can’t see my avatar! I have it set up from day on my oculus so I know that’s not the issue … but I’m just a grey clay person in the seems to be mirror/camera ? And the weekly count down dating thing doesn’t work I was there at the time and place and nothing happens on my end .. the place u spawn at looks kinda of childish (the back ground I mean) good concept lacks virtual reality. Can’t really see anyone unless ur walking the maps or places however u like to call it. Definitely needs improvement fast cause I’m ready to delete especially cause I can’t see my avatar and I’m forced to see some people have theirs 😂  I’ll say this I’ll revisit this review in six months if it has changed so will my review if it hasn’t well let’s just say this post will be around a long time then .. ✌🏽

reviews.review_title: The coolest social VR that I found
reviews.review_description: I like this app, it’s so cool to meet people here from all around the world like they are next to me, I met interesting people who with I can speak about what is in their country for real🇬🇷, like they feel, and travel with new mates by different locations, I can even hug someone and have the feeling of real hug🤗, exciting thing, would be happy if more interesting people would join to this warm community, thanks guys, keep making it better ✊

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your story, Anton! 😊
Our international community is very friendly and we love discussing about real life situations too! It is great to hear that you are enjoying our Travel feature 🌈🌎
There is nothing like having a 🔥 match in VR 🔥 and feel like you can actually hug them! 
We are so happy to hear your experience 
-Mr. Cheerio 😏

reviews.review_description: I really love Cheerio because it helped me meet more people who work remotely and enjoy spending their free time in virtual reality. I think it’s really interesting when you match someone in this app because it means that you both liked each other, I’ve met so many people that I actually wanna meet in real life and they are all so amazing! <3

developer_response.body:
Aww, thank you so much Claudix!🌈
If two people like each other, then it's a match!✨
-Mr. Cheerio 🤗

reviews.review_title: Great App in the Social VR space!
reviews.review_description: Cheerio is an awesome new app in the social VR space! Really enjoyed playing it. Great job by the Cheerio team!

developer_response.body:
✨Thank you! ✨❤️
We work hard for making Cheerio the most welcoming social VR space!🌈🌎
-Mr. Cheerio 🤗

reviews.review_description:
This app I awesome. You get to know new people and have new friends to play with.
Easy to understand. Fun to travel around on the map.

developer_response.body:
✨ We are so happy that you’re enjoying Cheerio, particularly the Travel feature 🌎 ✨
-Mr. Cheerio 😏

reviews.review_description: The community is so warm and welcoming. I used the “travel” feature to go to Paris with a new friend and it was fun ☺️

developer_response.body:
Awww, thank you Charlie! We love our warm community! 🥰
Yes, yes yes our Travel feature is one of the best things to do in VR!
Go anywhere in the world and meet people from different countries 🌈🌎
-Mr. Cheerio 🤗

reviews.review_title: First time seeing social holograms in VR
reviews.review_description: I think the idea behind recording and posting holograms is really cool

developer_response.body:
Yes!  Holograms are meant for you to feel authentic and free in VR 🌈
-Mr. Cheerio 🤗
